title: sophora chrysophylla subsp. unifoliata
intro: Sophora chrysophylla subsp. unifoliata is a subspecies of the Sophora chrysophylla plant, also known as the Hawaiian Sophora or Yellow Sophora, a flowering plant native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sophora chrysophylla subsp. unifoliata include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for various herbal applications, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in modern medicine.
